Function re_viewer::external::re_data_store::external::arrow2::bitmap::from_chunk_iter_unchecked

pub unsafe fn from_chunk_iter_unchecked<T, I>(iterator: I) -> Vec<u8> ⓘ
where
    T: BitChunk,
    I: Iterator<Item = T>,
Expand description

Creates a Vec from an Iterator of BitChunk.

Safety

The iterator must be TrustedLen.
